channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Wheelie bin unsanitary, 8th April
item.description:
The wrong items have been placed into this bin and so it has not been collected. This bin is in a communal space and has not been collected for some time and has become unsanitary attracting rats. Please can it be emptied?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Merryfield, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suspecylted illegally parked vehicle. Not recognised as a resident., 8th April
item.description:
Car parked an hour. Not recognised as parking here. Occupants not recognised as residents. When leaving the vehicle the passenger threw rubbish including a plastic bottle onto the grass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birchmore Walk, Highbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White van parked on pavement blocking pavement outside no18 stanley way, 8th April
item.description:
The van has been parked on the pavement for more than two days you have to walk in the grass to get past it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Stanley Way, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street sign is facing the wrong way, 8th April
item.description:
School sign is facing the wrong way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodside Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken street sign on Woodside Road, 8th April
item.description:
Street sign is missing the road name

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodside Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights outside St John's, Waterloo not working, 8th April
item.description:
At least 9 street lights outside the church are off, making the area unusually dark.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waterloo Road, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping rubbish in the alleyway, 8th April
item.description:
Regarding dumping of rubbish in the alleyway near the sub station box near samson house maxey road i have cctv footage of what house they went in as well
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maxey Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Larger graffiti on the side of building near primary school on Webb street, 8th April
item.description:
Graffiti on the building this is unsightly and next to a primary school , it will encourage more graffiti all over the wall am surrounding buildings

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Webb Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disgusting mess, 8th April
item.description:
Over flowing bins, disgusting mess. Why am i paying a caretaker to keep this area clean???

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bridge Gardens, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, 8th April
item.description:
Mattress dumped in this hot spot

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lewisham Road, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th April
item.description:
Tonight some lowlife has dumped aload of rubbish right outside out property.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Riverdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti with profanities, 8th April
item.description:
Going up the stairs on the right wall there is written profanity in a few sentences. Please walk up the stairs and look right on inside wall in white graffiti.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victorian Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars parked on a double yellow line causing congestion, 8th April
item.description:
Every week just outside Forest Hill station (platform 2 exit) on Perry Vale, cars are parked along the whole road on a double yellow line. This makes it impossible for two-way traffic. This usually occurs in the evenings.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Perry Vale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot Holes in Road, 8th April
item.description:
Large pot holes on both sides of the road. Cars are dangerously driving around them into oncoming traffic
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dreadful build up of litter, 8th April
item.description:
At either end of the pedestrian foot bridge that crosses over the A406 litter has accumulated. It desperately needs to be cleared.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Advent Way, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste bin full filled with cans and bottles, 8th April
item.description:
Food waste bin full filled with cans and bottles. It has been there for a month already and not collected as the waste inside does not correspond with the waste bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2,3,4, Melior Place, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Arson Vandalism to Cycle Bay Bollards, 8th April
item.description:
Ongoing campaign against essential bike parking bay which has been newly installed. Bollards vandalised/burnt. Bikes repeatedly vandalised. Please rebuild robustly to ensure that this much needed facility is retained.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Rise, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trip hazard, 8th April
item.description:
It’s been like this for a while

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continual dumping of waste, 8th April
item.description:
More multiple bags of waste have been dumped again! These multiple black bags have been left on numerous occasions recently. It’s becoming increasingly frustrating!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: [Portable loo] abandoned by council, 8th April
item.description:
There is a zip tied [Portable loo] that had been left by council builders? It’s really starting to smell and has been left in a residential area
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Felstead Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
